inlineCompletions.insertText: const pathname = usePathname()

const searchParams = useSearchParams()
const query = searchParams.get('q')

<Image
  src="/image.png"
  width={500}
  height={300}
  alt="Description"
/>

<Image
  src="/image.png"
  fill
  sizes="(max-width: 768px) 100vw, 50vw"
  alt="Description"
  className="object-cover"
/>

<Link href="/path">

</Link>
